major.heading: Search strategy not reproducible
major.comment: The search strategy is described in one line with no database-specific syntax; eligibility criteria are prose rather than a numbered list.

major.heading: Duplicate record handling unclear
major.comment: Screening counts in the PRISMA flow do not reconcile with the records identified.

major.heading: Overreaching clinical recommendation
major.comment: Clinical actionability is asserted but generalizability to community settings is not supported.

major.heading: Applicability to the target population
major.comment: The included studies are tertiary-center only; clinical relevance to primary care is overstated.

major.heading: Heterogeneity not addressed
major.comment: I2 exceeds 90% yet a fixed pooling is reported without justification.

major.heading: Pooling model mis-specified
major.comment: Random-effects model assumptions and the confidence interval method are not stated.
